name: Quiver DevKit
shortDescription: A developer-focused Quiver kit for builders who want to test, modify, and extend Arrow's open-source VTOL platform.

included.label: Quiver airframe
included.notes: CNC 6061 aluminum plates, carbon fiber arms and landing gear, busbars, and PETG-CF enclosure — built and tested to the Quiver Manufacturing Guide.

included.label: Propulsion set
included.notes: Hobbywing XRotor X6 Plus G2 motor/ESC/propeller sets, plus a spare propeller set (2 CW + 2 CCW).

included.label: Avionics suite
included.notes: Holybro Pix32 v6 flight controller, Raspberry Pi 5 (8 GB), H-RTK F9P and M9N GNSS, radar altimeter, SIYI A8 mini gimbal camera, SIYI HM30 FPV link, Remote ID module, and onboard Ethernet network.

included.label: Arrow PCB set
included.notes: Assembled main, flight-controller, and battery-controller PCBs with full wiring harness.

included.label: Arrow-sanctioned build standard
included.notes: Manufactured to the linked Quiver manufacturing guide and related standards.

notIncluded.label: Payloads and optional sensors
notIncluded.notes: Obstacle-avoidance lidar, forward radar, and a transport case are planned as optional add-ons.

requiredSeparately.label: RC transmitter and receiver
requiredSeparately.notes: e.g. RadioMaster Boxer with compatible receiver.

standards.label: Quiver Manufacturing Guide
standards.description: Primary build standard for Arrow-sanctioned Quiver DevKits.

offers.leadTimeDisplay: Ships in 3 business days while stock lasts; built to order after that

checkout.customerNotice: Pay by card or USDC: JPL sends a Stripe invoice with your order confirmation. A direct online payment link is coming soon.

daoFee.publicLabel: Includes 20% Arrow DAO support & marketplace fee

offers.notes: Initial trusted MVP offer. DAO fee percentage is proposed via this catalog entry and subject to DAO approval; expected to decrease as the program matures.

checkout.customerNotice: Checkout URL is TBD. Payment will be accepted by the manufacturer as merchant of record.

offers.notes: Placeholder EU offer for model validation; confirm scope with Julius before public launch.
